## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve or what feature does it add?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] New style / effect / preset
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Changes

- Change 1
- Change 2

## Testing

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] All tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Tested in browser (if UI change)

## Code Generation (if codegen/engine change)

- [ ] Generated ProffieOS code compiles in Arduino IDE
- [ ] Output matches expected ProffieOS templates

## Screenshots

If this is a UI change, include before/after screenshots.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — edge cases, trade-offs, follow-up work.
